description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- Sync: Added two ways to sync reading progress with Koreader devices
- EPUB: Applied monospace font settings
- EPUB: Fixed initial text alignment for some EPUB files
- PDF: Fixed issue opening large PDF files on Android
- TTS: Improved book language detection when language code is invalid
- iOS: Fixed applying system color scheme in auto theme mode
- Config: Added option to choose reading progress display style (percentage or page number)
- Library: Added option to delete only the local copy of a book
- Account: Added 'Reset Password' button in the account page
What's Changed
- tts: tts now works when language codes are mistakenly set with language names by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1737
- translator: add more translator languages by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1738
- api: migrate usage stats from KV to db by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1739
- feat: add reset password button in user page by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1742
- compat: detect book language from text for invalid language code in metadata by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1743
- fix: chunk of cache item now has enough space for read of MAX_CACHE_CHUNK_SIZE, closes #1392 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1744
- fix: NativeFile access for file URI when importing files on iOS, closes #1746 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1747
- fix: thread-safe NativeFile read for PDF on Android, closes #1748 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1751
- feat: readest koplugin for progress sync by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1753
- Update translation.json by @StepanSad in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1756
- css: apply monospace font settings for EPUBs, closes #1754 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1757
- auth: avoid infinite loop of redirect and auth after token is expired by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1758
- css: mix with background color for horizontal rule, closes #1649 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1759
- fix: apply system color scheme for iOS in auto theme mode, closes #1762 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1767
- feat: add option to config reading progress format by @afrolino02 in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1761
- chore: cache nextjs build for CI by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1771
- sync: add xcfi to convert between readest epubcfi and koreader xpointer by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1774
- feat: added option to delete only the local copy of a book by @arutonee1 in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1773
- fix(sync): correct xpointer spine index and omit certain tag index by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1781
- feat: Implement KOReader Progress Synchronization by @zeedif in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1770
- sync: refactor koreader sync settings by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1783
- feat(sync): add readest koplugin for progress sync, also implements #1729 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1785
- css: fix initial text align, closes #671 again by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1786
- release: version 0.9.71 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1787
New Contributors
- @afrolino02 made their first contribution in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1761
- @arutonee1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1773
- @zeedif made their first contribution in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1770
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.69...v0.9.71
